name: ctu-thesis-cli
description: Cross-platform Bash CLI for Can Tho University (CTU) students to scaffold, build, validate, and manage Typst thesis projects — compliant with Decision 4125/QĐ-ĐHCT (2024). Fully bilingual (English/Vietnamese). 9 commands for the full thesis lifecycle: init, build, validate, doctor, clean, config, chapter, update, help.
author: Phat Nguyen
